title: bossiaea endlicheri var. ovalifolia
intro: Bossiaea endlicheri var. ovalifolia, also known as the oval-leaved bossiaea, is a flowering plant native to Australia. It is a shrub or small tree that belongs to the family Polygalaceae, known for its medicinal properties. The oval-leaved bossiaea is used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or ointments, which are used to relieve pain, reduce swelling, and promote wound healing.
